# hexcode — Changelog

Auto-generated by `update-externals.sh`. Each entry records what changed between pulls.

## Update 2026-05-14 — `23c70bb` → `d4cee69` (v0.7.0)

436 files changed, +10,443/-6,591. PRs #14-#16 (Imbuements, Patcher, triggers, bugfixes).

### CastingEventData → HexContext Unification (BREAKING)

- **CastingEventData DELETED** — all cast state (power multiplier, volatility tracker, wielder ref) merged into HexContext
- **HexCastEvent simplified** — now wraps only `HexContext`. Removed `getWielderRef()`, `getCastingData()`
- **HexContext expanded** (+316 lines) — unified serializable state object:
  - `getExecutionId()` — UUID per cast, shared across all branches (NEW)
  - `getPowerMultiplier()` / `setPowerMultiplier()` — moved from CastingEventData
  - `getVolatilityTracker()` — moved from CastingEventData
  - `getCasterRef()` — via `HexRoot.getSourceRef()` (replaces `getWielderRef()`)
  - `branch()` — parallel execution fork sharing executionId
  - `cloneState()` — deep copy for persistence
  - `applyNonDefaultsFrom()` — overlay merge for imbuement overrides
  - Full BuilderCodec with 11 serializable fields

### Trigger System (NEW — 20 files)

Reactive event-driven spell execution. Trigger glyphs (OnPrimary, OnSecondary, OnUse, OnCast, OnDeath) subscribe to player interactions and resume hex execution when conditions fire.

- **TriggerRegistry** — global map of registered triggers with Source types (ITEM_HELD, ITEM_EQUIPPED_ARMOR, ENTITY_SELF, MANUAL)
- **TriggerListenerRegistry** — per-world ECS Resource storing active subscriptions
- **FireTriggerSystem** — WorldEventSystem draining trigger events into registry
- **AbstractTriggerGlyph** — base handler creating HexStatus constructs + HexResumeCallback
- **InteractionTriggerSource** — packet watcher for SyncInteractionChains

### Imbuement System Rework (NEW — 24 files)

Complete redesign from data-only to asset-driven dispatch architecture.

- **ImbuementProfileAsset** — JSON-defined profiles for item categories (weapon, armor, block)
- **EssenceAsset** — modifies volatility multiplier and hex style per element
- **ImbuedBlockComponent** — ECS component for blocks storing imbuement data
- **Dispatch system** — ItemHeldCastDispatcher, ItemEquippedArmorCastDispatcher, EntitySelfCastDispatcher, ImbuementTriggerBootstrap
- **BlockHexRoot** (NEW HexRoot subtype) — casts from blocks, not players

### Patch System (NEW — 4 files + 100+ .patch assets)

Asset hot-patching via JSON deep merge. Replaces runtime reflection armor patchers.

- **PatchManager** — collects `.patch` files, deep-merges with base assets, registers override pack
- **JsonDeepMerge** — recursive merge with `key+` array append syntax
- 100+ armor `.patch` files adding mana/volatility stats to all vanilla armor tiers
- **ArmorManaPatcher / ArmorVolatilityPatcher DELETED** — reflection-based patchers removed

### HUD Adapter (NEW — 6 files)

Abstraction layer decoupling HUD management from business logic.

- **HudAdapter** interface — getCurrentHud(), setHud(), clearHud()
- **HudController** — singleton using adapter for info display
- **VanillaHudAdapter** — default impl; MultipleHudAdapter for MHUD compat
- **SeekerObelisk** — now uses HudController, yields to foreign HUDs

### Deleted Systems

| System | Replacement |
|--------|-------------|
| CastingEventData | HexContext (unified state) |
| ArmorManaPatcher + ArmorVolatilityPatcher | PatchManager (.patch files) |
| ArmorManaConfig + ArmorVolatilityConfig | Embedded in .patch assets |
| CombustGlyph + CombustStyle | Removed (glyph deleted) |
| HexEffectHandler + HexEffectRegistry | ConstructHandler pattern |
| GlyphInfoHud | HudController + HudAdapter |
| ConstructStripper | Inlined |
| StateRouter | Inlined into state classes |
| CodecUtil | Inlined into HexFieldCodec |

### Other Changes

- **Glaciate bug fixed** — constructor arg swap (15× damage) and duration += → -= (never expired)
- **VolatilityTracker** — gained `slotKey` (staff vs slot-bound), `applyOverridesFrom()` (overlay merge)
- **Deterministic volatility** — no randomized drain (confirmed in v0.6.7, maintained)
- **New glyphs**: Absolute, OnCast, OnDeath, OnPrimary, OnSecondary, OnUse
- **Erode tools**: 6 new tiered items (T1-T6)
- **Essence items**: 6 element essences + concentrated variants
- **Styles moved**: `builtin/styles/` → `builtin/staffStyles/`
- **Listeners moved**: `builtin/listeners/` → `builtin/eventListeners/`

### Integration Impact: BREAKING (1 change)

- **BREAKING**: `CastingEventData` deleted → use `HexCastEvent.getContext()` (HexContext)
- **BREAKING**: `HexCastEvent.getWielderRef()` removed → use `getContext().getCasterRef()`
- **POSITIVE**: Armor reflection conflict RESOLVED (patchers deleted, replaced by asset patches)
- **POSITIVE**: SeekerObelisk yields to foreign HUDs (no more clobbering)
- **POSITIVE**: `HexContext.getExecutionId()` enables deterministic damage attribution
- **NEW**: hex_combust damage source removed (CombustGlyph deleted)
- All other 12 contract surfaces INTACT (HexcasterComponent, HexState, HexEffectsComponent, etc.)

---

## Update 2026-05-04 — `35ba883` → `be0e97e` (v0.6.6)

### Commits

```
be0e97e Merge pull request #11 from ItsRiprod/Feat(Kitchen-Sink)
ddde9b4 Radians Migration + Better Compression
9420ae1 Recipe Fixes and Tweaks
661cc1c Fixed drawing to other packs
6be24d4 Fixed conjure not despawning
484e23d Stability Improvements
```

### Key Changes (87 files, +2079/-608)

**Codec Overhaul (major)**
- New HexCodecV15 (703 LOC) — complete rewrite with better compression
- New HexCodecV16 (267 LOC) — compact radians-native format
- New HexFieldCodec — Hytale Codec<Hex> wrapper for BSON serialization
- New HexCacheResource — per-world hex caching (ECS Resource)
- New CodecUtil — shared compression utilities
- HexBookComponent now uses HexFieldCodec.PLAYER, filters empty pages on save

**Radians Migration**
- All angle values (Sin, Cos, Tan, Shatter spread, RotationVar, PositionVar) converted from degrees to radians
- Existing spells using V14 codec are auto-migrated on load

**Conjure Rework**
- ConjureGlyph completely reformatted (332 lines touched — mostly code style, same logic)
- ConjureConstructHandler: duration check moved BEFORE tick logic (was AFTER) — fixes conjure not despawning
- Conjure default duration increased 5s → 30s in glyph JSON

**Crafting Recipes Added**
- Hexstaff_Basic_Copper: 16 copper bars + 4 wood + 5 sticks + 8 light hide (T2 workbench)
- Hexstaff_Basic_Iron: 16 iron bars + 4 wood + 16 heavy hide (T3 workbench)
- Concentrated essences: recipe tweaks for Fire, Ice, Void

**Gameplay Tweaks**
- Glaciate: new "immediate" slot (fires immediately after cast)
- Drain: mana cost reduced 12 → 0 (it's a resource converter, shouldn't cost mana)
- Subtract: operands now have default values (0)
- Style glyph shape changed Circle → Square
- Shatter: spread description/default now in radians (0.5236 rad ≈ 30°)

**Bug Fixes**
- Fixed conjure zones not despawning when duration expired
- Fixed drawing recognition failing with other asset packs loaded (pack override system)
- Fixed particles missing from previous version

**New HexcasterComponent Methods**
- `getTrainingPackOverride()`, `setTrainingPackOverride()`, `consumeTrainingPackOverride()` — multi-pack drawing support

**ImbuementData Additions**
- `setHexFromValue(Hex)` — serialize hex inline
- `resolveHex(HexCacheResource)` — lazy hex resolution from cache

**Integration Impact: NONE**
- All 10 reflected API surfaces unchanged
- All 6 hex_ damage source strings unchanged
- All 7 API events unchanged
- Safe to deploy v0.6.6 alongside our current integration

---

## Initial Clone — 2026-05-01

- **Commit**: `35ba8832b55c064379d523732d85c95f4d5de234`
- **Branch**: main
- **Total commits**: 151


## Update 2026-05-09 — `be0e97e` → `23c70bb` (v0.6.7)

65 files changed, +1497/-379. PR #13 (Patch/Compression) + reverted PR #12 (MachineBreaker Protractor).

### Scale Glyph Rewrite (major)

Complete rewrite of entity scaling — now stack-based with proper reversal.

- **ScaleStackComponent** (NEW ECS component, persisted via CODEC) — tracks `baseAssetId` + `Map<constructId, magnitude>`. `productOfContributions()` computes total scale. Registered in `Hexcode.onEnable()` with BSON codec.
- **ScaleState** moved to `components/` subpackage, now tracks `constructId`, `appliedMagnitude`, `remainingSeconds`, `modelAssetId`, `visualRef`
- **ScaleConstructHandler** moved to `handler/` subpackage. On cleanup: removes contribution from stack, recomputes absolute scale via `ScaleGlyph.applyAbsoluteScale()`, removes component if stack empty, restores original model.
- **ScaleGlyph.execute()** — no longer mutates EntityScaleComponent/BoundingBox directly. Creates ScaleStackComponent on first apply (captures base model asset), adds contribution, computes absolute scale via `Model.createScaledModel()`. Visual only spawned for upscale (magnitude ≥ 1.0).
- **ScaleGlyph.consumeVolatility()** — now reads current scale from ScaleStackComponent and uses exponential cost curve: `expm1(0.5 * (resultScale - 1))`. Larger = exponentially more expensive.
- **ScaleGlyph.applyAbsoluteScale()** — new public static method for external use. Creates Model from base ModelAsset, sets EntityScaleComponent.
- Old: direct `scaleComp.setScale()` + `box.scale()` — no reversal, no stacking, BoundingBox grew infinitely.
- New: clean reversal via contribution map, model-based scaling, proper cleanup.

### Concentration Glyph Rework (major)

- **ConcentrationGlyphSlots** (NEW) — defines `RELEASE` slot. Concentration now has a dedicated release output path separate from NEXT.
- **ConcentrationStyle** (NEW) — renders spawn (primary VFX) and periodic tick (secondary VFX) particles.
- **ConcentrationConstructHandler** — completely rewritten:
  - `fireReleaseAndKillHeld()`: on button release, strips volatility bonus from held context, deep-copies context for the release branch (separate VolatilityTracker), registers tracker with idle component for q-cancel, then fires `continueFromSlot(RELEASE)`.
  - `emitSecondary()`: periodic (1s interval) tick VFX via ConcentrationStyle.
  - Q-cancel detection: if remaining budget ≤ 0 after q-press, skips the release branch entirely.
- **ConcentrationGlyph** — volatility bonus now captured in state (`state.setVolatilityBonus(bonus)`) instead of computed on cleanup. Visual uses style-resolved model instead of hardcoded "Concentration" ID.
- **ConcentrationState** — gained `tickAccum` and `volatilityBonus` fields with copy().
- **Concentration_Focus.json** (NEW model) — 3D model asset for concentration visual effect.
- **Concentration.json** — new `releaseSlot` configuration added to glyph definition.

### Volatility System Hardening

- **VolatilityTracker.consumeVolatility()** — removed randomized drain (`1 + random * (cost-1)`). Now deterministic: `remainingBudget -= finalCost`. This makes spell costs predictable.
- **Interfere glyph** — donation now uses `tracker.setBudget(0f)` instead of `tracker.consumeVolatility(donation)`. Zeroes budget directly.
- **Resonate glyph** — same `setBudget(0f)` fix. Also **removed mana transfer** (`transferManaToRoot()` deleted — was 20 lines). Resonate no longer transfers mana between casters.
- **Force glyph** — gained `consumeVolatility()` override. Computes applied magnitude from direction × magnitude, then uses area-scale-based cost multiplier. Previously had no magnitude-based cost scaling.

### Rotation Glyph Fix

- Entity rotation rewritten to use Hytale's `Teleport.createExact()` with proper body/head rotation split (yaw on body, full rotation on head). Was using `tc.teleportRotation()` which didn't work correctly.
- Block rotation rewritten to use `RotationTuple.index()` + `Rotation` enum. Uses `settings = 0x02|0x04|0x10` flags (preserve block-entity state, skip particles, skip filler churn).
- `quarter()` helper now works in radians (was degrees) — consistent with v0.6.6 radians migration.

### Seeker Obelisk Rework

- **SeekerObelisk** — now checks for foreign HUDs before setting its own: `if (current instanceof GlyphInfoHud existing) return existing; if (current != null) return null;` — **yields** to other mods' HUDs instead of clobbering them.
- Added `onExitCrafting()` override — clears HUD when leaving crafting mode.
- Uses `ensureOurHud()` pattern — reuses existing GlyphInfoHud if already showing instead of recreating.
- **GlyphInfoHud** — rewritten to anchor-based architecture. Uses a persistent `SeekerAnchor.ui` element, then appends/clears `GlyphInfo.ui` content into it via `showContent()`/`clearContent()`. No longer creates new HUD per hover event.
- **SeekerAnchor.ui** (NEW) — static UI anchor element for the seeker HUD.

### VFX System Expansion

- **VfxUtil** — new `spawnPrimaryDirected()` and `spawnConfiguredDirected()` methods. Spawn directional particle effects with rotation (yaw/pitch/roll). Used for beam trail particles.
- Added `HytaleLogger` for debug logging.
- All style classes (AreaStyle, BeamStyle, DomainStyle, HaltStyle, IgniteStyle, LevitateStyle, ScaleStyle, SwapStyle, ForceGlyphStyle) — gained `resolveModelId()` methods for style-overridable construct visuals.

### Area Scaling Fix

- **GlyphHandler.computeAreaScale()** — parameter renamed `magnitude` → `volume`. New `sphereVolume()` helper (`4/3 * π * r³`). Area/Beam glyphs now compute area tax using volume instead of raw radius/magnitude.

### Construct Spawn Race Fix

- **HexConstructSpawner** — added `WeakHashMap` race guard for simultaneous construct adds. When two glyphs spawn constructs on the same target in the same tick, the second now mutates the existing pending HexEffectsComponent instead of crashing with a duplicate `addComponent`. Affects damage attribution (cleaner single-component state).

### Crafting System Fixes

- **AnchorNodeHandler.ability()** — rewritten with two-phase clear:
  - Press 1 (soft clear): severs anchor→glyph link but keeps glyph entities alive
  - Press 2 (hard clear): despawns all child glyph entities via `GlyphNodeHandler.INSTANCE.despawn()`, clears refs, resets crafting state (dragging, expanded glyph)
  - Previously: single-press immediately severed links with no entity cleanup

### Balance Changes

- **Mana.json** — base regeneration doubled: `0.01` → `0.02` per 2s (still percentage-based, still requires 15s no-damage delay). ResetType field moved to bottom (formatting only).
- **AuraSpawner.java** — DELETED (replaced by style-resolved model IDs in each glyph style class)

### Particle Effects

- **Bolt_Burst.particlespawner** (NEW) — 154 lines, bolt explosion effect
- **Bolt_Hit.particlespawner** (NEW) — 160 lines, bolt impact effect
- **Bolt_Hit.particlesystem** (NEW) — particle system definition for bolt hit
- **Beam_Trail.particlespawner** (NEW) — 88 lines, continuous beam trail
- **Beam_Trail.particlesystem** (NEW) — particle system for beam trail
- Area_Pulse, Beam_Impact particles significantly expanded (50-80 lines added each)

### PR #12 (MachineBreaker) — Merged then Reverted

- `926d32a` MachineBreaker's Protractor optimization (closed-form angle search) was merged then immediately reverted in `174aa9f`. No net effect on codebase.

### Integration Impact: NONE

- **All 10 reflected API surfaces unchanged** — HexcasterComponent, HexState, HexEffectsComponent, HexContext, ProjectileState, ShatterState, HexcodeEntityStatTypes (3 stat methods)
- **New ECS component**: ScaleStackComponent — does NOT affect our reflection targets
- **SeekerObelisk now HUD-safe** — checks for foreign HUDs before setting its own. Positive for our integration.
- **Mana regen increase** — cosmetic for ToO since we override MaxMana via StatMapBridge
- Safe to deploy v0.6.7 alongside our current integration
